description: Delete all dead engine files (Genesis, Prometheus, CXN, MCE, thinking_engine, decision_engine, safe_parse.h) and update mk_entry.cpp to remove all references to deleted modules. Rewrite handle_natural_query() and generate_ai_response() to use the simplified single-LLM-call flow.
steps: Delete entire directories: MK_OS/ai_core/genesis/ (8 files), MK_OS/ai_core/prometheus/ (5 files), MK_OS/ai_core/cxn/ (4 files), MK_OS/ai_core/mce/ (6 files)
Delete individual files: MK_OS/llm/thinking_engine.cpp, MK_OS/ai_core/decision_engine.cpp, MK_OS/ai_core/safe_parse.h
In MK_OS/system/mk_entry.cpp: Remove #include lines for all deleted modules (mce_engine.cpp, cxn_engine.cpp, prometheus_engine.cpp, genesis_engine.cpp, thinking_engine.cpp, decision_engine.cpp)
In MK_OS/system/mk_entry.cpp: Remove from MKSystem struct: consciousnessEngine, crystalNetwork, prometheus, genesis, thinkingEngine, decisionEngine fields and their types

In MK_OS/system/mk_entry.cpp constructor: Remove initialization code for thinkingEngine, decisionEngine, consciousnessEngine, crystalNetwork, prometheus, genesis (Steps 4c, 4d, 4e, 4f initialization blocks and related sharedCasualTexts logic)
In MK_OS/system/mk_entry.cpp: Remove commands /trace, /echo, /crystals, /prometheus, /genesis, /dream, /identity, /fluid from REPL and from show_slash_suggestions and cmd_help
In MK_OS/system/mk_entry.cpp: Remove shutdown saves for deleted engines (consciousnessEngine.save(), crystalNetwork.save(), prometheus.save(), genesis.save())
In MK_OS/system/mk_entry.cpp: Remove all .absorb() calls (prometheus.absorb, genesis.absorb, consciousnessEngine.absorb) throughout the file

Rewrite handle_natural_query() conversation path: Remove the 3-layer architecture (thinking engine + decision engine). Replace with: greeting detected? -> template response | else -> gather context (graph facts via filterRelevantFacts + conversation history from brainMemory.getContextString() + tool output from a simple getToolOutputIfNeeded helper) -> ONE LLM call via cloudLLM.generateWithContext or llmEngine.generate with good system prompt -> sanitize -> respond. If LLM fails -> honest 'I am offline' message.
Rewrite generate_ai_response() (Telegram path) with same simplified logic: greeting? -> template | else -> one LLM call with context -> response | LLM down? -> honest offline message

Add a simple getToolOutputIfNeeded(input, sys) helper function: keyword-checks input for system/docker/device queries and returns tool output string if relevant (uses resourceMonitor, dockerManager, deviceRegistry). Returns empty string if no tool needed.
Remove mkHonestDegrade() function entirely - replace its usage with a simple inline 'I cannot reach my language model right now' fallback string
Remove the genesis.isInitialized() and mkLooksCoherent() references since genesis is deleted
Clean MK_SYSTEM_PROMPT to be simpler and clearer without references to internal engines
Ensure math_solver path remains untouched (instant math, no LLM needed)
Ensure /ask, /search, /think, /learn, /weather, /time, /news commands remain functional (they don't depend on deleted engines)
acceptance_criteria: Running 'cd MK_OS && make clean && make' succeeds with no errors
The binary handles: greetings (template response), math (instant), natural language questions (single LLM call), /quit (clean exit)
No references to MKConsciousnessEngine, MKCrystalNetwork, MKPrometheus, MKGenesisEngine, MKThinkingEngine, MKDecisionEngine remain in mk_entry.cpp
The deleted directories and files no longer exist on disk

Running 'printf "hello
what is 5 times 3
what is python
bye
/quit
" | ./mk_os' does not crash
verification:
cd MK_OS && rm -rf prometheus_data genesis_data cxn_crystals.dat && printf 'hello
what is 5 times 3
what is python
bye
/quit
' | ./mk_os
